name: exchekskills
description: ExChek for SMB manufacturers — 16 export-compliance skills + a local-first MCP server. Classify ECCNs, screen parties, check licenses, run audits, and produce audit-ready Word reports without hiring a consultant. Works in Cowork and Claude Code.

platform_tier.title: AI platform tier
platform_tier.description: Your privacy/training tier. ExChek records this in every audit-ready report. Recommended: Cowork enterprise, Claude Enterprise, Claude Team, or a Workspace with training disabled.

trade_gov_api_key.title: Trade.gov API key (free)
trade_gov_api_key.description: Free key from https://developer.trade.gov. Required only when you screen parties (CSL search). Stored in your OS keychain — never in plain text. Get one in 2 minutes if you don't have it; the screening tool will tell you when you need it.

audit_key.title: Audit-log HMAC key (optional)
audit_key.description: Lets you bring your own 32+ character key to seal the local audit log. If you skip this, the plugin generates one on first run and stores it owner-readable in the plugin data directory.

default_report_dir.title: Default report folder
default_report_dir.description: Where finished .docx reports land. Defaults to ~/Documents/ExChek-Reports. You can always override per-report.
